name: Boss says it's not work-related, how to prove it is in Salt Lake?
description: Expert doctor opinion + exposure records override denials.

mainEntity.name: Boss says it's not work-related, how to prove it is in Salt Lake?

acceptedAnswer.text: Expert doctor opinion + exposure records override denials.
acceptedAnswer.description: **Medical causation report linking symptoms to specific exposures like silica.** Pulmonologist testimony trumps employer denial[4]. Key factors: Dose-response data; rule out smoking; job exposure logs. Utah comp judges defer to experts. Demand air sampling records. Hire specialist MD early.
